name: 🔧 Refactor
about: Propose a code refactor or technical improvement
title: "[REFACTOR] "
labels: refactor, technical-debt
assignees: ''
---

## 🔧 Refactor Proposal

### Summary
<!-- A concise description of what needs to be refactored and why. -->

### Current State
<!-- Describe the current implementation and its shortcomings.
     Link to relevant files/lines if possible. -->

**Files / Modules affected:**
- `path/to/file.ts`
- `path/to/module/`

### Proposed Changes
<!-- Describe the refactored approach. What patterns, structures, or tools will be used? -->

### Motivation
<!-- Why is this refactor worth doing? Check all that apply. -->
- [ ] Improves readability / maintainability
- [ ] Reduces code duplication
- [ ] Improves performance
- [ ] Enables future features
- [ ] Fixes architectural issues
- [ ] Improves test coverage
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

### Risks & Considerations
<!-- Any breaking changes, regressions, or areas to watch out for? -->

### Definition of Done
- [ ] Tests updated / added
- [ ] No new lint warnings
- [ ] PR reviewed by at least one other engineer
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
